notes: The roll-3d mixing-bus graph (R-SYS-006): impact sounds route through Sound Effects (id ac936623e44e8bfb) into Master (id bbb1c5526b8a8280). Bus ids are L-33 stable intra-file ids (the id form is enforced inside a project dir; human labels live in `name`). The presentation-observer audio package (src/packages/audio/) mixes on miniaudio's NULL backend in the headless smoke gate -- entirely OFF the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001).
